title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: This month in AI featured significant releases across multiple organizations. Google tested Remy, a Gemini agent for autonomous work; Anthropic released Mythos 1; Elon Musk advanced Grok 5; Boston Dynamics upgraded Atlas; and DeepSeek cut prices. The underlying trend is the rapid rise of AI agents and humanoid robots capable of multimodal reasoning and real-world task execution.
